head.title: AI Production Agents for Engineering Operations | TierZero

meta.name: description
meta.content: TierZero's AI agents investigate incidents, triage alerts, and fix production problems automatically — so your engineers can ship faster.

meta.name: keywords
meta.content: AI Production Agents, AI SRE, AI DevOps, AI Internal Support, AI CI/CD, AI Production Agents for Engineering Teams
AI Production Agents for Engineering Operations | TierZero
TierZero's AI agents investigate incidents, triage alerts, and fix production problems automatically — so your engineers can ship faster.

meta.name: twitter:title
meta.content: AI Production Agents for Engineering Operations | TierZero

meta.name: twitter:description
meta.content: TierZero's AI agents investigate incidents, triage alerts, and fix production problems automatically — so your engineers can ship faster.

head.script: [{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"Organization","name":"TierZero","url":"https://www.tierzero.ai","logo":"https://www.tierzero.ai/logos/tierzero_logo.svg","sameAs":["https://www.linkedin.com/company/tierzeroai"],"description":"TierZero's AI agents investigate incidents, triage alerts, and fix production problems automatically — so your engineers can ship faster."},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"WebSite","name":"TierZero","url":"https://www.tierzero.ai","description":"TierZero's AI agents investigate incidents, triage alerts, and fix production problems automatically — so your engineers can ship faster."},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[{"@type":"Question","name":"What is TierZero?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"TierZero is an AI production agent platform that automatically investigates incidents, triages alerts, answers internal engineering questions, and fixes CI/CD failures. It integrates with your existing observability stack and operates in Slack, so your engineers can focus on shipping features instead of firefighting."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How does TierZero differ from AIOps and AI SRE tools?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"AIOps tools use statistical ML for anomaly detection and alert correlation. AI SRE tools focus on incident investigation and root cause analysis. TierZero is an AI production agent that covers the full post-deployment lifecycle: incident response, alert triage, internal support Q&A, CI/CD automation, and proactive issue discovery. AI SRE handles 20-30% of operational work; TierZero targets 60-70%."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How long does it take to set up TierZero?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"TierZero integrates with your existing stack in about an hour. Connect your observability tools (Datadog, Grafana, New Relic), incident management (PagerDuty, Opsgenie), and communication channels (Slack). The agent starts investigating real alerts and incidents on day one."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"Is TierZero secure enough for regulated industries?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Yes. TierZero is SOC 2 Type II certified and HIPAA compliant. It offers SSO/SAML with RBAC, full audit trails, zero data retention options, and on-premises deployment via Terraform for organizations that require complete data sovereignty."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"What results can I expect from deploying TierZero?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Customers typically see 40%+ reduction in mean time to resolution (MTTR), root cause identification in under 10 minutes (down from 40+ minutes), and thousands of engineering hours saved annually. Drata saved over 7,000 engineering hours per year after deploying TierZero."}}]}]

h2.class: text-2xl sm:text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-[56px] font-normal font-heading text-foreground max-w-4xl mx-auto

div.h2:
The dream was building things.
Not babysitting them.

p.class: text-base sm:text-lg md:text-xl text-muted-foreground mt-6 sm:mt-8 max-w-2xl mx-auto leading-relaxed

div.p: Every alert, every incident, every “quick question” is code that didn’t get written.

section.class: relative pt-16 md:pt-20 pb-8 md:pb-12 bg-[hsl(240,10%,3%)]

h2.class: text-2xl sm:text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-[56px] font-normal font-heading tracking-tight text-foreground

p.class: text-base md:text-lg text-muted-foreground mt-3 max-w-2xl mx-auto leading-relaxed

div.p: AI production agents that live in your stack, solve problems automatically, and get smarter with every issue they resolve.

div.class: w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-foreground/10 flex items-center justify-center

svg.class: lucide lucide-triangle-alert w-4 h-4 text-foreground/70

h2.class: text-2xl sm:text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-[56px] font-normal font-heading mb-8

div.h2: By the time you open your laptop, TierZero already has your answer.

rounded-[10px] border border-[hsl(220,10%,22%)] bg-[hsl(220,10%,8%)] overflow-hidden select-none pointer-events-none h-full

img.alt: TierZero incident investigation report showing executive summary and root cause analysis

div.p: When an incident is raised, TierZero Incident Agent joins and starts investigating — scanning logs, traces, metrics, deploys and other signals across your entire stack.

div.class: w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-primary mt-2 shrink-0

div.div: Investigates across logs, metrics, spans, deploys, and code

div.div: Timeline, root cause, 5-why's and action items

div.h2: Every alert, now with blast radius intel and recommended actions.

rounded-[10px] border border-[hsl(220,10%,22%)] bg-[hsl(220,10%,8%)] overflow-hidden select-none pointer-events-none h-full

div.p: TierZero Alert Agent picks up every alert and investigates automatically. Noisy alerts get flagged, related alerts get grouped, and known issues get rediscovered.

div.class: w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-primary mt-2 shrink-0

div.h2: Answers code and infra questions backed by live systems, not stale docs.

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-8 lg:gap-12 items-start
rounded-[10px] border border-[hsl(220,10%,22%)] bg-[hsl(220,10%,8%)] overflow-hidden select-none pointer-events-none h-full

div.p: TierZero Support Agent responds to queries in your #ask-eng and #ask-infra channels. It doesn't just search docs. It investigates live systems: checking build logs, querying infrastructure, reading recent commits. Tribal knowledge scales without burning out the people who hold it.

div.class: w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-primary mt-2 shrink-0

div.div: Not just doc retrieval. RAG is dead.

div.class: w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-primary mt-2 shrink-0
w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-primary mt-2 shrink-0

a.class: mt-6 inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-primary font-semibold text-sm group

h2.class: text-2xl sm:text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-[56px] font-normal font-heading

div.h2: Trusted by top engineering leaders to accelerate their roadmap.

div.class: rounded-2xl bg-muted/40 border border-border/10 p-5 sm:p-8 md:p-10 relative overflow-hidden

span.class: absolute top-2 left-4 sm:top-4 sm:left-6 md:left-8 text-[5rem] sm:text-[8rem] md:text-[10rem] text-primary/[0.12] font-serif leading-none select-none

blockquote.class: text-base sm:text-xl md:text-2xl font-medium text-foreground/90 mb-6 max-w-4xl leading-relaxed

div.blockquote: TierZero materially changed how our engineers respond to incidents. All these alerts can now be understood much better. The investigations start with context and not guesswork like it was before.

div.class: flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-4
w-10 h-10 rounded-full overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0 border border-white/30

a.class: inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-primary hover:text-primary/80 font-medium text-sm transition-colors

div.class: rounded-2xl bg-muted/40 border border-border/10 p-6 md:p-8 relative overflow-hidden

span.class: absolute top-3 left-5 text-[5rem] text-primary/[0.12] font-serif leading-none select-none

div.blockquote: Without intelligent automation, engineers must cast a wide net — analyzing alerts, correlating events, detecting cascading effects — all of which can take hours when seconds count. TierZero does this in minutes. It's a game-changer, simultaneously improving customer satisfaction while lowering operational costs.

div.class: w-9 h-9 rounded-full overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0 border border-white/30

div.div: Director of SRE and DevEx, Netflix

div.class: rounded-2xl bg-muted/40 border border-border/10 p-6 md:p-8 relative overflow-hidden

span.class: absolute top-3 left-5 text-[5rem] text-primary/[0.12] font-serif leading-none select-none

div.blockquote: TierZero didn't just help us fix one issue. It opened the door to a completely new way of working. We're using more tools, adopting AI across the board, and finally have the breathing room to think strategically.

div.class: w-9 h-9 rounded-full overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0 border border-white/30

a.class: inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-primary hover:text-primary/80 font-medium text-sm transition-colors mt-4

span.class: text-xs font-mono font-medium tracking-widest text-primary border border-primary/30 rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 uppercase

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-8 lg:gap-12 items-start

h2.class: text-2xl sm:text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-[56px] font-normal font-heading mb-6

div.h2: Debug the agent like you debug your stack.
div.p: Context Engine synthesizes signals from code, infra, conversations, and documents into a living knowledge and context graph. Intelligence compounds with every interaction, turning fragmented noise into structured context.
Because you can't trust an agent you can't inspect.

a.class: inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-primary hover:text-primary/80 font-medium text-sm transition-colors mt-6

div.p: Optimize cloud and observability costs. Surface waste, rightsize resources, catch billing anomalies.

div.p: Surfaces hidden issues and reliability risks before they page anyone.

h3.class: text-xs font-bold tracking-widest text-primary mb-6 uppercase

a.class: flex items-start gap-4 py-4 group border-b border-border/10 last:border-b-0 hover:bg-muted/10 -mx-3 px-3 rounded-lg transition-colors
